name: @centraid/data-plane
description: Rust byte/transport plane for the Centraid gateway

scripts.test:contract: bun run test:contract:typescript && bun run test:contract:rust
scripts.test:contract:rust: cargo build --locked && cd ../.. && CENTRAID_RUN_BYTE_PLANE_CONTRACT=1 CENTRAID_BYTE_PLANE_IMPLEMENTATION=rust CENTRAID_BYTE_PLANE_BIN=packages/data-plane/target/debug/centraid-data-plane ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run packages/gateway/src/lifecycle/byte-plane-over-http.test.ts --maxWorkers=1
